targets.queryText: SELECT SUM(trades_count) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day');
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT SUM(trades_count) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day');

targets.queryText: SELECT dividends_30d AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT dividends_30d AS value FROM daily_portfolio ORDER BY as_of_date_local DESC LIMIT 1;

targets.queryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day');
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) AS value FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local >= date('now','-30 day');

targets.queryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(dividends_30d, 2) AS amount, ROUND(current_yield_pct, 1) AS yield FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND dividends_30d > 0 ORDER BY dividends_30d DESC;
targets.rawQueryText: SELECT symbol, ROUND(dividends_30d, 2) AS amount, ROUND(current_yield_pct, 1) AS yield FROM daily_holdings WHERE as_of_date_local = (SELECT MAX(as_of_date_local) FROM daily_holdings) AND dividends_30d > 0 ORDER BY dividends_30d DESC;
